summary.intent: Generate development-ready story files for all remaining backlog stories in a BMAD sprint using parallel agents to maximize throughput.
summary.outcome: First 4 stories (1-4, 2-1, 2-2, 2-3) were created and marked ready-for-dev; a second batch of 4 agents was launched for the remaining 7 stories (2-4, 3-1 through 3-3, 4-1 through 4-3).

repo: Sprint state is tracked in `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.yaml` and must be updated after each story batch.
Story files follow naming convention `{epic}-{story}-{slug}.md` under `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/`.
Epic 2 was marked `in-progress` when story 2-1 was created, implying epic status is derived from story creation order.
WebSocket reconnection/fallback logic is intentionally out of scope for story 2-2 and deferred to stories 4-1/4-2.

code.finding: Price flash mechanic uses data attributes + double requestAnimationFrame pattern with 200ms throttle and prefers-reduced-motion support.
6 formatter functions built on Intl.NumberFormat; 4 Nano Stores defined with full edge-case test coverage.
Cards use `.card-glass` CSS class with reserved heights to achieve CLS=0; chart card spans full width.

workflow: Running 4 parallel agents against a sprint-status.yaml is an effective pattern for bulk story generation.
When stories outnumber agents (7 > 4), distributing as pairs per agent is the preferred load-balancing strategy.
The /bmad-create-story skill reads sprint-status.yaml to determine which stories are next, so keeping it updated between batches is critical.

friction: Second batch of 4 agents was launched but results were not included in the transcript — outcome for stories 2-4 through 4-3 is unconfirmed.
open_items: Stories 2-4, 3-1, 3-2, 3-3, 4-1, 4-2, 4-3 were queued in the second agent batch but their completion status is not recorded in this transcript.
WebSocket reconnection and fallback logic (stories 4-1/4-2) is intentionally deferred from story 2-2 scope.
Sprint status YAML update after the second batch of 7 stories still needs to be verified.
